core.when: When resolving instruments under a specific historical pricing date
core.action: Use PricingContext(pricing_date=...) context manager with the desired date — the pricing service computes missing parameters using the market data as of that date

consequence.description: Resolving without an explicit PricingContext will use the current date, which introduces look-ahead bias in historical pricing scenarios.

core.when: When choosing trade_duration for FX option roll strategies
core.action: Use 'expiration_date' as trade_duration to hold options until their expiration — using a tenor that does not match the option's actual expiry will cause premature or delayed unwinding

consequence.description: Setting a fixed tenor trade_duration on an option with a different expiration will either exit before expiry (losing remaining option value) or hold past expiry (causing errors on non-existent instruments).
